description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-push that runs on push to the calamares branch, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronize events, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job running in a kdeneon/plasma:user container, setting up environment variables and installing dependencies. It then prepares the source code, builds the project using cmake and make, and installs it. Finally, it sends a notification to an IRC channel on success or failure.
